bonusTasks.promptTitle: Build vs Buy Decision for Payments
bonusTasks.claudePrompt: I am a PM at a mid-sized Indian e-commerce company (5M monthly orders). We currently use Razorpay for payments. The CEO wants to evaluate building our own in-house payment stack to save 1.5% MDR. Help me structure the build vs buy vs partner decision. What are the hidden costs of building, what capabilities would we need, what are the regulatory requirements, and what would you recommend?
